paragraphs: Get precise protection for personnel and equipment with Carelabs’ arc flash study in Singapore.

At Carelabs, we encourage our clients to adopt proactive safety measures like arc flash studies for Singapore industries. Our solutions help companies address key concerns like electrical safety, reliability, and compliance with standards like OSHA, NFPA 70E, IEEE 1584, and Singapore standards like SS 651:2019.

At Carelabs, our team validates extensive protection and safety from electrical hazards with integrated support and effective solutions. We specialize in offering continual support to our clients in Singapore.
Our technical support includes arc flash risk analysis, using ETAP to generate arc flash labels, and marking arc flash boundaries

Don’t leave arc flash hazards to chance. At Carelabs, our team expertise combined with ETAP technology helps your business in Singapore reach its full potential safely. Partner with Carelabs today and leverage the power of ETAP for comprehensive arc flash risk assessment.
We analyze multiple electrical system devices to pinpoint the areas of high risk for arc flash incidents.

Employers need to assess electrical risks regularly and provide the right PPE and training to the workforce.
Electrical equipment and devices must have arc flash hazard labels.
The arc flash risk assessments must comply with the standard WSH guidelines.
